text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Phew. Today's photo shoot really dragged on. I
missed my chance to eat back at the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(This is happening a lot lately. The only proper
meal I had today was lunch. I've gotta do
something before my body reaps the
consequences.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Oh wait, I can just pack my own food. I won't
have to skip any meals if I bring food with me to
my shoots. Good thinking, me!)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, not again! How are these eggs going from
raw to burnt without any warning?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Maybe deciding to make my own meals all of a
sudden was a little too ambitious...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Welp, I guess this will have to do.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: (I knew this was going to taste bad, but this is bad bad. This stuff's still half-raw while this stuff's half-burnt... This sucks...)

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text: City, we're going to be starting again in five!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oops. Okay! Coming!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see Gold City at the park, on set for a shoot.
She doesn't look all too well, though, so I stick
around to watch over her, just in case.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: (...Ugh, I feel a stomachache coming on.)

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
You look great, City! Now, if you would just look
straight at the camera...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Nope. I can tough this one out... I hope. I just
need to focus on the camera.)

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text: And that's a wrap. Good work today!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City, are you all right? You look a little pale.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What? No, yeah, I'm fine. The makeup artist
probably just used a foundation that's too blue
for me.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure that's why? You're sweating, and I
could tell you weren't totally focused during the
shoot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Nothing gets past you, does it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I just have a little stomachache. It's nothing
serious. Lunch wasn't the tastiest thing in the
world today, that's all.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Wait, did you make your own lunch? Why would
you push yourself like that when you're already
stretched so thin?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Just let me handle all your meals. You should
really count on me more for these things.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: There's food back at the dorm, so I'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: I think it's pretty clear that you're not fine... I know a good restaurant that serves nourishing meals. We can go there after this.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
I think they offer take-out too, so I'll have them
deliver meals to you from now o—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Quit that already! You coddle me too much!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(...Geez, why does she like to baby me so much?
But then again, I'm the one who messed up here.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(I was the one who decided to pursue both
modeling and racing, so it's my fault that I'm
always so busy and don't have time to eat.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(I've got to get my act together... This is my
problem to solve.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Guess I should stop by a bookstore so I can buy a
cookbook and learn the basics of cooking...
